judgeScores.justification: The campaign demonstrates strong voice consistency and persuasive use of social proof (Sarah testimonial) across email and landing page materials, with platform-appropriate social content (casual Twitter, professional LinkedIn). However, landing-page.txt is truncated mid-FAQ, leaving the deliverable incomplete, and hero-copy.txt redundantly duplicates the landing page hero section. While the calendar-integration angle provides fresh, audience-appropriate positioning, the tagline is somewhat generic.
